packages.name: koppa-portscan
packages.description: Advanced TCP/UDP port scanner with service detection and banner grabbing

packages.name: koppa-webfuzz
packages.description: Web fuzzer — directory/file brute-force, parameter injection, vhost discovery

packages.name: koppa-jwt-attack
packages.description: JWT token attack toolkit — decode, forge, alg-none, brute-force secret

packages.name: koppa-hashcrack
packages.description: Hash identification and cracking — MD5/SHA/bcrypt/NTLM wordlist & rules

packages.name: koppa-recon
packages.description: Passive & active recon — subdomain enum, DNS, WHOIS, email harvest

packages.name: koppa-exploit
packages.description: Exploit helper — CVE lookup, payload gen, shellcode, reverse shell builder

packages.name: koppa-evasion
packages.description: AV/EDR evasion — AMSI bypass, ETW patch, anti-debug, anti-VM, obfuscation

packages.name: koppa-bruteforce
packages.description: Multi-protocol brute forcer — SSH, FTP, HTTP, SMB, RDP, MySQL, Redis

packages.name: koppa-c2-client
packages.description: KOPPA-C2 agent — connect to C2, execute tasks, exfil data over HTTP/DNS
